[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00001000 1
5 00010001 2
6 10101010 4
7 00011000 2

01 10 00010000 1
12 21 00010001 2 match 5
23 32 10011001 4
34 43 01011001 4
45 54 00001001 2
56 65 00001001 2
67 76 11101010 5
70 07 00001010 2

02 20 00011010 3
13 31 00010001 2 match 5
24 42 00111011 5
35 53 00001001 2
46 64 01111111 7
57 75 00001000 1 match 4
60 06 00011010 3
71 17 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3

03 30 00011000 2 match 7
14 41 00010001 2 match 5
25 52 00001001 2
36 63 11011001 5
47 74 01101010 4
50 05 00001000 1 match 4
61 16 00010001 2 match 5
72 27 10101010 4 match 6

04 40 00011010 3
15 51 00000001 1
26 62 10111011 6
37 73 11001000 3
